title: Write a ChannelCase that wires sandbox automatically
prompt: Write `test/support/channel_case.ex` (MyAppWeb.ChannelCase) that: (1) `use ExUnit.CaseTemplate`, (2) in `setup tags do`, call `MyApp.DataCase.setup_sandbox(tags)` then return `{:ok, conn: Phoenix.ConnTest.build_conn()}`, (3) register a helper macro/function `connect_socket/0` that builds a `Phoenix.Socket` with the sandbox metadata encoded and ready. Also import `Phoenix.ChannelTest` and `MyAppWeb.ChannelCase` into all users.
